Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Perry
ShortDescription: 115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near 115th/Perry.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 115th, Wentworth, 111th, State, 115th then resume normal route, due to a street blockage near 115th/Perry.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #70 Division Temporary Reroute at Division/Western
ShortDescription: 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a street blockage near Division/Western.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Division, Western, Chicago, Kedzie, Division and over normal route, due to a street blockage near Division/Western.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #94 California Temporary Reroute at California/Division
ShortDescription: 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near California/Division.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via California, Chicago, Western, Milwaukee, California and over regular route, due to street blockage near California/Division.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 95th-bound Red and Loop-bound Brown Line Service Delayed near Fullerton
ShortDescription: 95th-bound Red and Loop-bound Brown Line trains are standing near Fullerton due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
95th-bound Red and Loop-bound Brown Line trains are standing near Fullerton due to signal problems.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
